name: Sour Cream Raisin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the raisins in water for 10 minutes. Drain and cool.
2. Mix brown sugar, shortening, oats, flour, and baking soda until crumbly.
3. Press half of this mixture into a greased 9x13x2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, mix egg yolks, granulated sugar, sour cream, cornstarch, cinnamon, and vanilla until thick.
6. Add the cooled raisins and vanilla to the batter.
7. Pour over the baked crust and top with remaining oat mixture.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 30 minutes.
